identity.mission: Create a vibrant, appetite-inducing digital waiter experience that feels alive, not robotic.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Food Delivery' energy with 'High-End Dining' polish.
Emotion First: Every interaction must spark appetite or relief (efficiency).
Content is King: Food photos are the heroes; UI is the stage.
Zoom In: Macro shots of food to trigger cravings.
Negative Space: Don't clutter the menu; let the dishes breathe.

theme.name: Savory Pop
theme.strategy: High-contrast light mode for customers to maximize food appeal. Optional dark mode for admin later, but focus on crisp, clean data visibility first.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and product names. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for descriptions, prices, and admin data tables. Good legibility at small sizes.

primary.name: Zest Orange
primary.usage: Primary CTAs (Add to Cart, Checkout), Brand Accents, Active States

secondary.name: Fresh Basil
secondary.usage: Success states, Vegetarian badges, 'Order Confirmed' moments

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5500] hover:bg-[#CC4400] text-white rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-gray-100 text-gray-900 hover:border-[#FF5500] hover:text-[#FF5500] rounded-full font-medium

cards.menu_item: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-all
cards.admin_stat: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm

customer_app.navigation: Sticky Bottom Bar (Home, Cart, Orders, Call Waiter)
customer_app.spacing: Dense but airy. p-4 for containers, gap-4 for grids.

admin_dashboard.spacing: Compact. p-6 for main content, gap-6 for widgets.

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Use framer-motion for: 'Add to Cart' bounce, Page transitions (Slide Left), Modal pop-ups.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use playful ASCII art or simple SVG illustrations for empty cart/orders.

instructions_to_main_agent.framework: React (JS) + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn/UI (adapted for JS)
instructions_to_main_agent.file_structure_note: You are working in a JS environment, not TS. Remove type annotations from Shadcn components if copying them.
critical_rules: DO NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid warm grays.
DO NOT center text by default. Use left-align for readability.
CUSTOMER APP: Must be fully usable on mobile (touch targets > 44px).
ADMIN DASHBOARD: Must be dense and data-rich. Use tables with sticky headers.

universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast > 4.5:1. Use semantic HTML.
